positionAssessments.position: P1 — Hard CI-enforced whole-spec budget (10-20k token anchor, kernel reserve priced first, calibration audit before cut authority)
positionAssessments.strengths: Correctly identifies the governance gap: D2 names spec description-length/regularity the first-class metric yet nothing enforces it, and the corpus's own recorded failure (round2-synthesis Open tensions: periphery accreting into 'a second, evidence-free language', six uncoordinated drift mechanisms) shows the existing null-hypothesis-CUT discipline did not bound uncounted growth. Its procedural apparatus survives the critique intact: counted token+rule deltas on every design change, whole-spec DIFFERENTIAL accounting (a construct that deletes N ad-hoc rules is correctly kept), kernel-reserve-priced-first sequencing, the no-shadow-spec rule, and spec-as-CI-artifact — which is also the missing prerequisite for the syntax A/B, drift, and every in-context experiment round 2 already ordered. The dual-support argument partially survives: a smaller writable surface genuinely shrinks the F003 frontend soundness chokepoint and the N006-priced validation program even if token count is the wrong unit. Its concessions are honest and mostly correct.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: The headline number does not survive its own concessions: the 10-20k anchor is uncarded (no one has tokenized Lua 5.4, R7RS-small, or the drafted floors with a real BPE tokenizer), the position admits full manuals plausibly bust 20k, and its own risk analysis (a moved number permanently damages credibility) argues against pre-registering a number it expects to move. The retrodiction claim ('the budget reproduces the round-2 verdict lattice') was never computed and is one-sided — round 2 also MANDATED spec-heavy writer-visible machinery (typed operation tables with coherence rules, contract-group kernel, FFI declaration frames, named mode vocabulary, env-struct diagnostics). Card overreach confirmed by the critic: C004's confirmed scope is data-race prevention only (07-02 amendment sharpened it), not evidence the full D1 kernel (ownership/borrow system, obligation ledger, FFI frames) fits any budget; N006 prices optimizer folds, not spec tokens — the carded benefit maps to rule/production count, collapsing most of the carded case into P3's regime. Internal contradiction between 'spec-cost as the tie-breaker NOW' for the open tensions and concession 5's 'pre-registered input to experiments only' is unresolved. What survives is 'hard-in-procedure, not hard-in-threshold' — operationally near-identical to P3 plus a premature constant.

positionAssessments.position: P2 — Kernel-scoped hard budget + on-demand layered specs (conservative-extension law, census-gated 80% kernel path)
positionAssessments.strengths: Names the real deployment pressure the others under-weight: the spec shares context with the mandatory re-read artifact, site-enumerated edit lists, machine-readable diagnostics, and the program under repair (round2-synthesis 'Additions' section), so resident share is bounded whether designed or discovered. Several components have standalone value regardless of layering: the conservative-extension law (layers only add vocabulary at kernel extension points; unknown constructs are deterministic hard errors under canonical-form + closed-world, so under-provisioning costs iterations, never soundness), spec provisioning recorded in provenance, content-addressed version-pinned spec artifacts, and the observation that round-3's overflow ruling (wrap fallback legal) supplies a kernel-safe default arithmetic. Its U1-U8 empirical program is the best-specified of the three and should largely be adopted as the experiment battery.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: The architecture answers resident-context share while D2's text constrains TOTAL description — layering GROWS total normative mass (extension law, layer registry, provisioning protocol, per-layer budgets, version-pinning) to shrink residency, a trade rational only if its own untested premises U1/U7 hold; it concedes it abandons a hard bound on total spec size. The kernel/layer partition collides with decided floors at named points: storage/lifetime contracts are mandatory on EVERY allocation (round2-synthesis line 29) — majority-path surface, not layer material — and typed operation tables are the blessed CORE dispatch form (line 27). Citation defects verified against the corpus: 'F001 CONFIRMED 2026-07-02' is false (the 07-02 set is A001/A002/A006/C004/D001/D002/D003/D005/D007/J004); D004 says nothing about spec serving; D009 is provisional and documents performance degradation, not silent semantic reinterpretation; the N001 flagship example was never writable-subset mass (the UB/poison ladder is compiler-internal under either architecture). The 80%-kernel claim rests on a census (U4) that does not exist, and layer-membership knowledge is itself uncounted description mass of exactly the context-dependent kind D2 taxes. Premature as adopted architecture; valuable as an experiment arm.

positionAssessments.position: P3 — No pre-registered number: machine-checkable regularity invariants (one spelling, zero context-dependence, empty exception lists, stated-once) + ratcheted rule count; numeric budget only measurement-derived
positionAssessments.strengths: Most faithful operationalization of corrected D2's literal text — the invariants map one-to-one onto the directive's enumerated budget-eaters (sugar, alternate spellings, inference, elision, special cases) and are style- and tokenizer-invariant, avoiding re-enshrining the exact proxy failure the corpus already recorded (round2-syntax's 1.35-1.48x regex-proxy lesson). Matches the project's demonstrated decision procedure (measure-then-threshold with pre-committed gates, per the round-2 verdicts) and caveats.md's standing rule: with zero in-context-acquisition cards, any specific number silently engraves an untested model-behavior claim as law. Its Goodhart analysis of a binding cap is credible and specific: the cheapest tokens to cut are exactly what D2 values (worked examples, fully-spelled quantifiers), and compression pressure converts explicit statements into denser context-dependent formulations — irregularity increased while the metric improves. The spec-as-checked-artifact and spec-regression-ratchet mechanics are adoptable immediately and force composition-over-addition, which is D2's uniformity demand made structural.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: The ratchet inherits the arbitrariness it condemns one level down: initial per-layer rule bounds are judgment numbers with zero acquisition data, rule individuation is undefined and gameable (mega-rules, parameterized schemas, giant uniform tables), and a ratchet binds the delta from an unmeasured level — it cannot detect that the level is already too high. Governance asymmetry cuts against it: caps fail loudly, ratchet gates fail quietly, and its learning-curve harness is a critical-path dependency whose delay forces stalled evolution or a waived gate (its own words: worse than a crude cap). Its 'forcing function already satisfied' claim is contradicted by the corpus it cites — periphery accretion happened UNDER the existing discipline. It commits the offense it polices: the ~2x prose-variance figure is invented, and D001 is cited for a procedural claim that belongs to the generics verdict, not the card. Its style-invariance superiority claim holds for the three binary invariants but not for the quantitative part ('few', the ratchet) that actually replaces the cap.

keyTradeoffs: Pre-registered number vs measured-later number: a hard constant is cheap to adjudicate, fails loudly, and forces real prioritization fights now — but with zero acquisition cards it engraves an untested model-behavior claim, invites Goodhart compression (example deletion, rule-merging into context-dependence), and a later recalibration permanently damages the gate's 'hard' credibility; a measured-later number is evidence-honest but fails quietly and stalls if the learning-curve harness slips.

Total-description vs resident-context accounting — the sharpest tension: a monolith-with-cap is coherent only if total description binds; kernel-plus-retrieved-layers is coherent only if resident share binds (it grows total description to shrink residency). D2's text says total; its stated rationale (in-context teaching) is a residency argument; the arbitrating experiments (spec-size ablation, context-competition, retrieval-substitution) are unrun. Adopting either architecture now pre-empts the experiment all sides claim to defer to.

Token count vs rule/production count as the gated unit: tokens capture everything D2 names (including examples) but are tokenizer-dependent and prose-gameable; rule counts are style-invariant and map to the carded costs (F003 frontend soundness surface, N006 proof-grade validation per rule) but lack an individuation procedure and are mega-rule-gameable. Neither suffices alone; both need a canonical counting procedure that no position defines.

Counted-ledger discipline vs uncounted-ledger accretion: every regime relocates mass to its uncounted side (P1 to toolchain, P2 to layer specs, P3 to gate procedures and checked-spec tooling), yet the corpus's only documented accretion failure occurred precisely on the uncounted side; registries are proposed but no position grants cut authority over uncounted complexity, making all three one-sided by construction.

Rules vs examples in one budget pool: rules interact combinatorially (P1's own interaction-complexity concession) while worked examples are near-additive and explicitly part of D2's teaching channel; a single budget over heterogeneous pedagogical material risks optimizing away the cheaper-per-token teaching medium — the exchange rate is untested (examples-ratio ablation).

Budget as tie-breaker for the open tensions vs experiment deferral: spec-cost is the only measurable criterion available NOW for interfaces/closures/sharing (P1's strongest practical pitch), but round 2 ruled those 'empirically unarbitrable today' with ordered experiments and pre-committed thresholds; a budget-broken tie that pre-empts a needs_evidence verdict must carry a recorded reopening condition or it silently overrides decided procedure.
evidenceGaps: Zero AI-codegen / in-context-acquisition evidence cards exist (round2-syntax records this explicitly and orders a new lane that is still unopened). Every load-bearing learnability claim — spec-size degradation knee, irregularity-vs-size dominance, context competition, retrieval substitution, rules-vs-examples exchange rate, cross-model transfer — is EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED.

No calibration measurements exist: Lua 5.4, R7RS-small, and (critically) a drafted round-2-floors + round-3-envelope spec have never been priced in real BPE tokens or counted rules. P1's 10-20k anchor, P1's retrodiction claim, and P2's 80%-kernel partition are all unpriced assertions; the floor-pricing audit is the cheapest missing artifact and blocks all three positions.

Kernel-reserve size is unknown and moving: the FFI wall (research_needed, zero primary-source cards), concurrency surface (C004 kernel undesigned), region/arena contracts, and the two needs_evidence outcomes (interior annotations, interfaces/bounded quantification) will add spec mass after any regime hardens. Note the D1a ruling's checker-simplification levers (explicit regions/borrows over inference, lexical borrows, minimal Featherweight-Rust/Oxide-class calculus) plausibly SHRINK the ownership spec description — also unpriced.

No canonical counting procedure is defined anywhere: which tokenizer(s), how rules are individuated (schema vs instantiations, table rows, quantified rule families), and what counts as normative. Without it every gate's arithmetic is contestable regardless of which metric wins — this is a procedural/owner decision, not an experiment.

Writer-emitted artifact schemas are uncounted shadow spec in all three regimes: the writer must learn in-context to emit provenance records (itself flagged EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED at round2-synthesis line 76) and to consume edit lists, elaborated re-read views, and machine-readable diagnostics — description mass excluded from P1's writable subset and P2's kernel alike.

The U4 workload census corpus (share of functions needing only kernel constructs in representative AI-generated performance-critical code) does not exist; P2's central architectural claim is unfalsifiable until it does.

D009 remains an unverified provisional card (decision-gates line 49) yet is used load-bearing by both P1 (pricing context-dependence) and P2 (conservative-extension safety analogy); its claim is Julia performance degradation, and the semantic-reinterpretation reading is an uncarded extrapolation.
leadingCandidate: Hard-in-procedure, number-by-measurement: adopt now the convergent accounting regime all three positions share once their overclaims are stripped — the spec as a single machine-checked artifact under P3's regularity invariants (one spelling per construct, zero context-dependent rules, empty exception lists, each fact stated once), plus P1's procedural apparatus (token AND rule-count deltas declared on every design change, a spec-delta column in decision-gates.md, kernel reserve priced first, no-shadow-spec rule extended to writer-emitted artifact schemas). No numeric cap acquires cut authority until the floor-pricing calibration audit and the pre-registered spec-size ablation locate a real degradation knee; monolith-vs-layers is deferred to the resident-vs-total experiments, with P2 demoted to an experiment arm and its conservative-extension law retained as the rule for any future spec partitioning.
rationale: The debate's decidable core and its empirical core separate cleanly, and the critic's analysis shows all three positions already agree on the decidable core once defects are removed. Decidable now: D2 must be operationalized as a gate, not advocacy — the corpus's own record (periphery accretion and six uncoordinated drift mechanisms produced UNDER the existing cut discipline) refutes P3's claim that the forcing function is already satisfied, while caveats.md's standing rule and the zero-card state of in-context acquisition refute P1's authority to pre-register 10-20k as anything but a placeholder (its own concession: hard-in-procedure, not hard-in-threshold). The intersection — checked spec artifact, style-invariant regularity invariants, counted token+rule deltas, kernel-reserve-first sequencing, no-shadow-spec — is supported by decided law and carded evidence on the non-model axis (F003: every writable rule is frontend soundness surface; N006: per-rule proof-grade validation cost; F006: restriction as the verification-first route) and requires no model experiment to justify. Genuinely empirical and therefore not decidable today: (a) whether a token-count degradation knee exists and where (P1's number), (b) whether irregularity dominates raw size (P3's causal claim and D2's own stated mechanism), and (c) whether total description or per-task resident share is the binding variable (the P1-vs-P2 architecture fork — the critic's sharpest tension). Engraving any of these as architecture before the ordered experiments run would repeat the exact failure mode this project's gate methodology exists to prevent: a design becoming law because it is governance-attractive rather than carded. P2's architecture is additionally ruled premature on non-empirical grounds — its partition contradicts decided floors (storage contracts are every-allocation mandatory; operation tables are core), and its load-bearing citations (F001 verification status, D004, D009, N001) fail verification. Sequencing note: the D1a/D0a rulings have now landed, so the calibration audit is unblocked and should price the SIMPLIFIED checker calculus D1a mandates, not rustc-class rules.
followUps: CALIBRATION AUDIT (blocking, cheap, no model required): draft the round-2 floors + round-3 safety envelope + annotation vocabulary + D1a-simplified ownership calculus as one normative spec artifact; price it with at least two real BPE tokenizers and a pre-defined rule-individuation procedure; publish token and rule counts. This falsifiably tests P1's kernel-reserve claim, P2's partition feasibility, and sets the floor any future number must clear. Open the corresponding card lane — it connects to the existing round3 backlog item ordering D2 pricing of annotation-vocabulary tiers.

ADOPT NOW (convergent, non-empirical): spec-as-checked-artifact with the four regularity invariants machine-enforced; every design proposal declares its spec delta (+N rules, +M tokens, 0 new spellings, 0 exceptions, 0 context-dependencies); add a spec-delta column to implementation/decision-gates.md; no-shadow-spec rule covering ALL normative content the writer needs, explicitly including provenance-record, edit-list, and diagnostic schemas.

DEFINE THE CANONICAL COUNTING PROCEDURE as a procedural/owner decision before any gate arithmetic is contested: named tokenizer set, rule-individuation rules (how schemas, table rows, and parameterized rule families count), and the normative/non-normative boundary.

SPEC-SIZE ABLATION (pre-registered, gates any numeric cap): teach the same kernel via spec variants at approximately 5k/10k/20k/40k tokens with fixed example budget, across at least two model families; metrics: first-parse success, floor-violation rate (ownership/mode/annotation errors), silent semantic-error rate via differential testing, repair iterations to green. Pre-commit: a measured knee within ~2x of the audited floor size hardens into a cap; flat curves through 40k demote the budget to rule-count ratchet only.

REGULARITY-VS-SIZE ABLATION (arbitrates P3's causal core and D2's stated mechanism): matched total tokens, uniform N-rule spec vs (N-k) rules plus k exceptions/context-dependent cases; compare error taxonomies on the same metric battery.

RESIDENT-VS-TOTAL ARBITRATION (decides the P1-vs-P2 architecture fork before any layering ships): context-competition (fixed window, vary spec share against realistic repair payloads), retrieval-substitution (spec-in-context vs on-demand lookup), and P2's U1/U7 kernel-vs-monolith and preloaded-vs-interleaved provisioning runs. Until these run, P2 is an experiment arm, not architecture; its conservative-extension law is retained as the standing rule for any future partitioning.

EXAMPLES-RATIO ABLATION: fixed total in-context budget split rules:examples at 80/20, 50/50, 20/80; decides whether examples need a separate budget currency from rules (the heterogeneous-material accounting question every position ignored).

TIE-BREAKER DISCIPLINE (rule to record now): spec-cost deltas may enter the two needs_evidence topics (interior-annotation regime, interfaces/bounded quantification) only as pre-registered inputs to their experiments' decision criteria, never as an override; any budget-influenced interim choice carries a recorded reopening condition naming the experiment it pre-empts.

UNCOUNTED-LEDGER POLICING: extend the gate with a registry and periodic audit of toolchain/layer-side normative mass, and grant the gate consolidation authority over duplicated drift machinery (the six-mechanism problem round2-synthesis names) — otherwise every regime pumps complexity to exactly where adversarial review is weakest.

RE-VALIDATION CADENCE: any measured number or curve is a model-generation snapshot; record a standing rule that hardened thresholds are re-validated per major model generation, with already-adjudicated cut decisions reopened only if the recalibrated knee moves past a pre-committed margin.

positionAssessments.position: Familiarity-first surface within the fixed regularity floors (Rust-adjacent lexemes AND Rust-shaped node/grammar forms, guarded by a prior-alignment invariant; every semantic delta spelled visibly novel)
positionAssessments.strengths: Correctly identifies that the round-2 floors already fix rule-set regularity, so the remaining choice is which single spelling each construct gets; the prior-alignment invariant ('familiar token only where checked semantics match the prior') is a principled contamination guard; the observation that the core's semantics are Rust-shaped by decree (D1 reference bar, F001 exclusivity, C004 capabilities, D001 mono-generics, Result+trap, zero implicit conversions) is accurate and card-backed; concessions are honest and it pre-commits a kill condition (fast penalty decay kills the position). Its error-class analysis (transcription-distance vs precedence-misbinding) engages the record's own named hazards rather than inventing new ones.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: Post-critique its distinctive content shrinks to the D2-priced part: the spec-neutral half (token strings) collapses into Position 3, while the Rust-shaped node inventory (braces/arrows/statement-like forms, more productions) is exactly what corrected D2 charges — contradicting its own 'approximately spec-mass-neutral' headline (its concession 1 admits this). 'Weakly dominates on both silent-error classes' is empirical dressed as structural: mandatory full parenthesization and per-node mode qualifiers are themselves re-encoding steps, so class (a) is reduced, not eliminated. Its central claim is NOT the carded experiment's measurand — the filed Syntax A/B is two-arm (verified: backlog line 43, canonical vs infix); the familiar-lexeme-canonical arm exists in no backlog item and its 'pre-committed kill thresholds' exist nowhere. The prior-alignment invariant is one sentence of spec but N fuzzy match judgments against Rust-as-trained (informal, edition-drifting, Nomicon-partial per caveats.md) with an admittedly unowned delta audit — a governance-level special-case generator. Shape-level prior predictions are wrong almost everywhere under uniform mandatory annotation (no ?, no closures, no elision), so the transfer channel is narrower than the rhetoric. Cites D010 without the required unverified flag (verified: round3-synthesis no-votes list).

positionAssessments.position: Regularity-first: maximally uniform canonical surface even if alien; familiar tokens admissible only as isolated rule-free lexemes; familiarity purchasable later only as the gated bijective write-codec
positionAssessments.strengths: Under a rule-count reading of D2 its argmin claim is analytic and the grammar-mass comparison is computable today without a model in the loop; fewer productions genuinely shrink the frontend trust path at the F003 soundness chokepoint (N006 prices each rewrite at proof grade; F006/SPARK is real restrict-expressiveness precedent); its steelman point 5 (adopt familiar rule-free lexemes) removes the maximal-alienness strawman; and its no-regret ordering argument is the strongest structural argument that survived critique — the parked bijective codec keeps familiarity purchasable later as tooling, while baking familiar forms into the stored canonical artifact is a language break to undo after artifacts and teaching examples accumulate.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: Its decisive third argument — 'regular-alien fails LOUD' — is contradicted by the record it cites: round2-syntax names a silent, typechecks-and-verifier-invisible class specific to the alien form (transcription-distance operand-order/associativity swaps), so both surfaces own a record-named silent class and the detectability asymmetry is not architectural. Its flagship exhibit (Rust-looking bare '+' lowering to a different contract) is unrepresentable under floors every position accepts (one named mode per arithmetic node); its own concession 3 admits the mandatory-explicit-facts floor is the load-bearing defense and alienness only second-order. It prices a 13+-level precedence table, sugar, elision, and multiple byte forms against an opponent who forswears all of them — a substantial strawman burden. 'Half this debate is decidable by arithmetic' overreaches because user-directives line 16 places examples INSIDE the description that must be small, so production-counting settles rule mass only. Deploys D009 as load-bearing without the required unverified flag (verified: round3-synthesis no-votes list). After its own steelman, its live disagreement with Position 3 is nearly nil.

positionAssessments.position: Lexicon/grammar split: keep the round-2 alien-regular canonical grammar untouched; borrow the lexicon (keywords, type names, annotation vocabulary) from the Rust/C prior where semantics substantially match, mint fresh names where they diverge, de-alias every borrowed name
positionAssessments.strengths: Correctly dissolves the debate's false dichotomy along the load-bearing seam: regularity lives in the grammar (already decided law — round2-syntax; A001's negative scope leaves lexicon genuinely undecided), familiarity lives in the token strings, and lexicon choice is spec-budget-neutral to first order. Its strongest post-critique survival is a genuine D2-INTERNAL argument no other position has: the spec's own teaching examples are written in the surface language and sit inside the protected in-context budget, so lexicon token-efficiency touches the D2 metric directly, not just behavior. The observation that the design record already conducts all discussion in Rust's metalanguage (Send/Sync, Result, monomorphization) is true and verifiable in every round file. It hedges both record-named silent-error classes without needing to know which dominates, and its relocation defense (per-node mode tokens deny the wrap-assumption a silent landing site) is sound under decided floors.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: The critique lands three real hits: (1) internal contradiction — if spec definitions are fully self-contained, the 'differs from Rust' delta lines are redundant mass; if they are load-bearing, the spec is conditioned on an unverified drifting prior (definition-by-delta, which its own concession disclaims); it must pick self-contained-plus-mnemonics and forfeit the delta lines' claimed function. (2) Its showcase contains an actual false friend: Rust's unchecked_* arithmetic is UB-on-overflow while the corresponding promise here is nsw/nuw-POISON, a distinction N001's ladder makes load-bearing — the 'pre-stabilized vocabulary' can import a semantic blur at exactly a divergence point, and the round2-type-inference line 30 'pre-stabilized' gloss confuses fixed strings with stable name-to-semantics mappings. (3) The BPE single-token claim is unchecked (its own E3) and stacked against a strawman — an alien lexicon can also use short single-token ASCII atoms. 'For most of the vocabulary the Rust name is the TRUE name' rests on a divergence census that has never been run, and the conceded residual silent channel (wrong-but-legal token selection under prior habit) is precisely the class the strict grammar cannot catch.

keyTradeoffs: D2 unit of measure (the sharpest tension, correctly identified by the critic): under a rule-count/irregularity reading (user-directives line 18) Position 2 wins by definition before any experiment; under a total in-context teaching-footprint reading (line 16 places 'examples' inside the description that must be small) Positions 1/3 can win — but only via 100% EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED example-efficiency claims. Both readings are textually supported; no one has asked the owner to fix the unit, and the positions are incommensurable until it is fixed.

Node-shape inventory (the only grammar question actually live): Rust-shaped forms buy an untested prior-transfer benefit — bounded above by the skeleton's share of tokens in a round-3-envelope elaborated artifact, which nobody has measured — at a spec-mass cost that is computable today by drafting both grammars and counting productions.

Lexicon borrowing: buys real BPE compactness of the spec's own in-context examples plus true-name alignment for semantics that are Rust's by decree, at the price of a de-alias table proportional to an unrun divergence census plus the one silent channel the canonical grammar cannot convert to a hard error (wrong-but-legal token selection at divergence points, e.g. unchecked-UB vs poison).

Silent-error symmetry: each surface owns a record-named verifier-invisible typechecks-but-wrong class — alien: transcription-distance operand-order/associativity swaps (round2-syntax); familiar: prior-import token selection — while the decided floors (per-node modes, canonical single spelling, grammar-rejected unlicensed forms) partially defuse BOTH flagship exhibits. The decisive quantity is the relative rate of two unmeasured silent classes, and the measurement has a shelf life across model generations shorter than the irreversibility of the decision it settles.

Reversibility asymmetry: an alien-regular canonical core keeps familiarity purchasable later as the parked gated bijective codec (tooling, zero spec cost); baking familiar grammar shapes into the stored canonical form is a language break to undo after artifacts and teaching examples accumulate. Lexicon choice, however, is sticky in BOTH directions (renaming is a breaking gated vocabulary event), so the codec escape hatch de-risks the grammar-shape decision far more than the lexicon decision.

Token-frequency benefit and autocomplete-contamination hazard are the same coin: the tokenizer statistics that make 'fn'/'match' cheap single tokens are what make Rust continuations mechanically high-probability after them — no brief weighed these jointly; the experiments must measure them on the same arm.

Falsifiability asymmetry (critic's most consequential addition): with a familiar lexicon, a passing teachability eval cannot distinguish spec-driven from prior-driven competence — 'the spec+examples suffice' is testable only on the alien rendering. Spec bugs masked by prior compensation surface only when the prior shifts; this is a long-term assurance cost of familiarity no position priced.
evidenceGaps: Zero AI-codegen evidence cards (round-2 standing flag; caveats.md standing rule): every prior-transfer, penalty-decay, false-friend, contamination, and example-budget claim in all three briefs is EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED.

The filed Syntax A/B (missing-research-backlog.jsonl line 43 — verified this session) is two-arm, canonical vs infix; the familiar-lexeme-canonical arm that Position 1's and Position 3's cases ride on exists in no backlog item, and no pre-committed kill thresholds for it exist anywhere.

Four computable-now, model-free artifacts have never been produced: (a) the spec-mass arithmetic (draft both grammar specs, count productions and exception clauses); (b) the real-BPE tokenizer census E3 (the 1.35-1.48x figure is a flagged regex proxy on fragments); (c) the divergence census (which Rust names are true names vs false friends — prerequisite for placing the false-friend battery's traps); (d) the skeleton-share census (fraction of tokens in a representative round-3-envelope elaborated artifact covered by any Rust prior — upper-bounds the familiarity benefit).

D009 and D010 remain direct-extraction with no adversarial-verification votes (verified: round3-synthesis no-votes list; the 2026-07-02 log covers only D001 and C004), yet both were deployed load-bearing without flags — one citation-discipline violation per side.

Neither silent error class has a measured rate: alien transcription-distance swaps and familiar prior-import token selection are both hypothesized only; no differential-testing data, no mixed-dialect (uncanny valley) data, no penalty-decay curves per model generation.

The owner has not ruled on the D2 unit of measure (rule count only vs total spec+examples in-context footprint) — a directive-interpretation gap, not an empirical one, and the single item that determines which position's arithmetic is even admissible.

Repair-loop exposure effects are unmodeled: every diagnostic/edit-list iteration feeds the model more canonical-form text, so production penalty decay may be dominated by session-accumulated exposure rather than curated examples — this confounds both the persistent-tax risk and the pre-committed kill conditions unless the experiment controls for it.

The marginal value of surface familiarity CONDITIONAL on the decided tooling architecture (node-path machine diagnostics, site-enumerated edit lists, elaborated re-read views) is a different quantity from raw generation familiarity and is the one that matters here; no experiment as specified isolates it.

The elaborator-as-codec / source-of-record tension (round2-synthesis open tension; round2-type-inference) is unresolved: if interior elision wins its experiment, the write surface and re-read surface diverge, and familiarity/regularity could be split across them — all three positions assumed one surface serves both directions.
leadingCandidate: Amended Position 3 (lexicon/grammar split): the round-2 alien-regular canonical grammar stands untouched (uniform node shape — Position 1's Rust-shaped node inventory stays out unless the three-arm experiment shows a large, persistent penalty for the uniform shape); the lexicon is selectively borrowed from the Rust prior ONLY where a completed divergence census shows substantial semantic match, with fully self-contained spec definitions (familiar names as mnemonics only — no definition-by-delta, no load-bearing 'differs from Rust' lines), minted novel tokens at every divergence point (numeric-mode vocabulary explicitly minted, not borrowed: Rust's unchecked_* is UB where ours is poison), and one written borrow-vs-mint policy stated once with a named owner.
rationale: The critique collapses the debate to something much narrower than the question as posed. Grammar regularity is not actually at stake: round-2 canonical form (one spelling, no sugar, no precedence, no elision, byte-canonical, tree-isomorphic) is decided law, Position 1 operates inside it, and Position 2's own steelman admits rule-free familiar lexemes — so the live variables are only (1) node-shape inventory and (2) lexicon policy. On (1), Position 1's distinctive claim survives only as an untested behavioral bet: its spec-neutrality headline contradicts its own concession, its dominance argument is empirical not structural (parenthesization and mode qualifiers are still re-encoding steps), and its central experiment arm is unfiled — while Position 2's reversibility argument survives critique intact: the parked gated codec makes familiarity purchasable later, whereas Rust-shaped canonical grammar is a language break to undo. On (2), Position 3 correctly prices the terrain (lexicon is first-order spec-neutral; the spec's own examples sit inside the protected D2 budget; much of the vocabulary names semantics that are Rust's by decree), but its showcase contains a confirmed false friend and its census is unrun, so borrowing must be census-gated and self-contained. Position 2's loud/silent asymmetry — its claimed escape from the empirical deadlock — fails on the record's own text: both surfaces own a named verifier-invisible silent class, and the decided floors partially defuse both flagship exhibits. What actually decides the residue is the relative rate of two unmeasured silent error classes plus the penalty-decay slope and example-budget differential — pure model behavior with zero cards — hence research_needed. The amended split is the leading candidate because it is the only position robust to the experiments' outcome: if familiarity proves worthless, the cost was a small de-alias table inside an unchanged grammar; if it proves valuable, nearly all of the harvestable benefit (lexicon plus spec-example compactness) is already captured without the irreversible grammar-shape bet. Two non-empirical items must precede any hardening: the owner ruling fixing D2's unit of measure, and the four computable-now censuses that make the model experiments interpretable.
followUps: Request an owner ruling fixing the D2 unit of measure and record it in notes/user-directives.md: does the 'description that must be small' count ONLY rule count/irregularity (line 18 reading) or the TOTAL spec+examples in-context footprint (line 16 reading, examples included)? This is decision-critical: rule-count-only decides for regularity-first by arithmetic; total-footprint makes the experiments decisive.

Run the four computable-now, model-free artifacts BEFORE any model experiment, each with a named owner: (a) spec-mass arithmetic — draft both grammar specs (uniform-wrapper vs Rust-shaped node inventory, both zero-sugar/zero-precedence/byte-canonical) and count productions plus exception clauses; (b) tokenizer census (P3's E3) — real BPE counts across current major tokenizers on matched spec+examples+programs under three lexicons: Rust-familiar, short-single-token-ASCII-alien (not strawman fragmenting atoms), and mixed; (c) divergence census — enumerate every candidate borrowed name, classify substantial-match vs divergence against dated Rust-stable documentation, size the de-alias table, and card the unchecked-UB-vs-poison false friend explicitly against N001; (d) skeleton-share census — fraction of tokens in a representative round-3-envelope fully-elaborated artifact covered by any Rust prior, which upper-bounds the total familiarity benefit.

File the three-arm surface experiment as a NEW backlog item (the existing Syntax A/B at missing-research-backlog.jsonl line 43 is two-arm and gates only the infix codec): arms (i) alien-uniform canonical, (ii) familiar-lexicon canonical (amended P3), (iii) Rust-shaped-node canonical (P1); identical-length in-context specs; real BPE tokenizers; whole programs. Metrics: first-parse success, examples-to-accuracy-threshold, penalty-decay slope per arm, generation tokens, repair iterations to green. Pre-commit kill thresholds IN THE FILING, e.g.: if arm (i)'s defect rate converges to within an agreed epsilon of arm (ii)'s within <=5 in-context examples, familiarity is a transition subsidy and the uniform surface wins; if arm (iii) shows no persistent advantage over (ii), the Rust-shaped node inventory is permanently rejected.

Run the silent-error differential battery (requires the divergence census first for trap placement): seed divergence-point tasks (mode tokens, no '?', no wildcard arms, explicit instantiation, no implicit conversions) and measure per arm (a) grammar-caught unlicensed-form emission, (b) wrong-but-legal token selection (silent), and (c) transcription-distance operand-order/associativity swap rate via differential testing against reference implementations — this measures the two record-named silent classes head-to-head, the actual decisive quantity of the debate.

Add a repair-loop exposure-decay probe to the experiment protocol: multi-turn regeneration with machine diagnostics; measure Rust-pattern fix-import rates per lexicon arm AND whether session-accumulated canonical-form text dominates penalty decay over curated spec examples — without this control the pre-committed kill thresholds in the three-arm filing are confounded.

Record the falsifiability asymmetry as a standing caveat in notes/caveats.md and as a design consequence: because familiar-arm teachability evals cannot distinguish spec-driven from prior-driven competence, the spec-completeness validation suite MUST include the alien-lexicon rendering even if a familiar lexicon ships — the alien rendering is the only channel that tests whether the spec is actually self-contained.

Complete the adversarial-verification sweep on D009 and D010 (both on the round3-synthesis no-votes list, both deployed load-bearing and unflagged in this debate) before the surface decision hardens, and propagate the unverified-flag discipline of round2-type-inference line 31 into future surface briefs.

Assign ownership of the standing governance artifacts this topic creates: the written borrow-vs-mint policy (one policy, stated once, applied uniformly), the divergence census maintenance, and the delta/prior-alignment audit that Position 1 admitted is unowned — an unowned audit converts every census miss into the silent-capture failure mode.

Resolve the write-surface/read-surface question jointly with the interior-elision experiment and the parked codec policy (round2-synthesis open tension: elaborator-as-codec): decide which artifact is source of record during repair loops BEFORE interpreting any surface experiment, since familiarity and regularity could otherwise be split across the surface the model writes and the canonical form it re-reads.

positionAssessments.position: Repair-loop-primary (kernel spec + checker-as-teacher via citation-grade diagnostics)
positionAssessments.strengths: Its toolchain-guarantee set largely survives independent of its allocation claim: stable content-addressed rule IDs, diagnostics carrying canonical rule text + node-path witness + edit list, determinism/byte-stability, one-defect-one-repair-site, rule-to-emitter coverage audit, and loop instrumentation are all cheap extensions of machinery round 2 already mandates for correctness (round2-synthesis lines 66-76), and the decided floors (canonical-form hard errors, zero implicit conversion/inference, banned wildcards, no writer-emittable trusted assertions) genuinely make acceptance track spec-conformance for checker-visible rules — the precondition ordinary languages lack (F006 apt; D009 apt as contrast, though unverified). Honest concessions; only position that designed the migration dial in detail.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: Three critic hits land hard. (1) D2 binds the language DESCRIPTION as an artifact (user-directives line 16 verified): if a 'long tail of rule elaborations, interaction cases, edge semantics' exists to warehouse in a citation database, the language already violates D2 wherever the text lives; under a D2-compliant few-rules language the eager-vs-lazy delta shrinks and the allocation argument loses magnitude — worse, lazy delivery removes the cost pressure that enforces the rule cap. (2) The rule-to-diagnostic bijection is broken by decided architecture it never cites: the adopted soundness-over-completeness lever (decision-gates line 74, verified) guarantees rejections that cite no violated rule and admit no mechanical fix (restructure demands), concentrated exactly on the nonlocal ownership errors everyone concedes are hardest; its diagnostic taxonomy cannot represent this class. (3) F003 is cited inverted (the card marks the frontend fact boundary as the soundness HAZARD, not a trust warrant), and 'same defect → same bytes → repair converges' states an untested model-behavior claim as fact while its own risk 3 concedes livelock is undesigned-against. The dynamic half rides unspecified concurrent-trap semantics (round3 lines 53-54), and diagnostic text becomes an unpriced N006-grade teaching TCB.

positionAssessments.position: Spec-primary (compact uniform spec carries the burden; loop = safety net, mechanical executor, telemetry)
positionAssessments.strengths: Owns the argument that survives even if loops become free: the silent-wrong asymmetry. The checker can only teach what it rejects, and the record's own verdicts enumerate checker-invisible classes — region pessimization/leak holes (round2-synthesis lines 60, 74), context-dropping Result variants (round2-error-handling), operand-order swaps (round2-syntax), and performance-wrong code generally, which is D0's actual objective — so a nonzero irreducible eager burden exists regardless of loop economics. Extending round-3 invariant 4 (artifact-checkable, not process-relative) to pedagogy is a genuine architectural harmonization: spec competence is version-pinned; repair-session competence evaporates at context boundaries. D2's few-rules cap plus uniformity-as-transfer, F006/SPARK, and the uncited K001 Austral card (learn-the-whole-language-from-the-spec philosophy) make the small fully-taught kernel the best-precedented feasibility story in the corpus.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: Two legs are manufactured or inverted, as the critic showed. Leg 2 litigates silence as law: round 2 decided a diagnostics FLOOR, not an explanatory-content ceiling, and P2's own obligation (b) (rule-cited diagnostics) proves it believes the channel extensible. 'One spec line amortizes to zero marginal cost' prices the debate's contested quantity at zero in its own favor — every task re-pays the in-context payload, which is exactly the cost structure D2's motivation clause names. The irregularity-meter (leg 3) cannot discriminate its three causes — D2-irregularity vs prior-interference against a uniform rule vs D1a checker incompleteness rejecting sound patterns — yet routes all persistent error mass to language redesign; that is an uncarded distributional claim at the position's operational core. And the silent-wrong asymmetry, its best leg, actually routes burden to a THIRD channel (by-construction language design + differential/silent-wrong harness, per the record's own decided remedies), not to spec prose; 'can only live in the spec' overreaches, though 'cannot live in the loop' stands.

positionAssessments.position: Curriculum-as-build-artifact (generated, budgeted, CI-gated teaching pack; split discovered by ablation)
positionAssessments.strengths: The mechanism is the decided architecture applied to teaching: a deterministic provenance-checked generator (round-2 consistency mechanism 2) producing content-addressed views over the canonical substrate, with example extraction made sound by the single-spelling floor — extracted examples are re-verified subtrees that cannot drift. Its per-rule ablation experiment (drop rule text, add repair example, measure deltas under fixed budget) is the most precise answer-procedure any position offers for 'how much burden moves', and converting the split from doctrine to a measured knob matches the project's own epistemics (pre-committed thresholds, gate-before-promote). Only position that prices the missing consideration that the diagnostics/report vocabulary is itself spec mass a writer must be taught eagerly.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: Systematically overclaims, as the critic documented. 'Only position with a measurement mechanism' is false (P1 ships loop instrumentation, P2 a fleet ledger and spec-ROI curve); its true distinctive — CI-gating language changes on current-model pass rates — is precisely the process-relative acceptance round-3 invariant 4 resists, plus model-idiom lock-in (baking 2026 priors into permanent design). 'The pack is D2's regression test' is a category error: pack tokens and pass rates measure size and model difficulty, not irregularity, D2's stated metric; a uniform verbose rule grows the pack while being owner-ruled spec-cheap. The C004 gloss contradicts Layer 1 (unproven D1-critical facts are runtime-checked under trap=abort — dynamic, one-lesson-per-process-death, not 'complete compile-time lessons'). 'Cannot drift' covers only code subtrees — kernel prose and anti-prior notes can rot, and pack-faithfulness validation is a conceded undesigned deliverable. The closed diagnostics vocabulary cannot close over an open spec (concurrent-trap, bare-'+', interior regime), making 'novel free-text errors are toolchain bugs' vacuous or a permanent blocker.

keyTradeoffs: Eager vs lazy delivery economics: an eager spec pays a fixed per-task context cost for rules most programs never touch; lazy diagnostics pay per-violation full generate/check/re-read iterations (and, for Layer-1 dynamic lessons, one process death each under trap=abort). Unmeasured in both directions; the heavy-tail violation-distribution premise decides the magnitude, and D2's few-rules artifact cap shrinks the delta either way.

Coverage vs economics: the repair loop can only teach checker-visible rules; the classes that matter most under D0 (performance-wrong code, region pessimization, context-dropping, operand swaps) are rejection-invisible by construction, and the adopted soundness-over-completeness lever adds sound-but-rejected restructure demands that are neither spec-rule citations nor mechanical fixes. So allocation can never be purely loop-side regardless of who wins the token economics.

Diagnostic richness vs diagnostic trust: teaching-grade diagnostics (rule text + witness + fix) accelerate repair if the ablation confirms it, but convert diagnostic text into a TCB-adjacent surface where a wrong citation actively teaches a false rule — demanding N006-grade tested-and-versioned maintenance, an unpriced cost carried in proportion to how much teaching the loop does.

Artifact-checkable vs process-relative competence: spec-encoded knowledge is version-pinned, auditable, and identical fleet-wide (extends round-3 invariant 4); repair-session knowledge is per-instance, washes out at context boundaries, and is re-paid per session unless a distillation channel works — and every distillation channel is itself a D2 accretion vector needing the unified gating regime.

Writability gating vs model lock-in: CI-gating language changes on current-model pass rates catches teachability regressions before shipping (J002-style guard) but re-instantiates process-relative acceptance and risks baking today's model priors into permanent language design.

Toolchain proliferation vs charter: the three positions propose three overlapping telemetry systems and three privileged spec-evolution channels over the same checker; shipped separately they reproduce the near-duplicate-machinery drift the charter forbids in source — unification is required, not optional.

Loop-latency dependence: any loop-side teaching share puts the closed-world whole-program check (round-2's biggest unpriced cost) and the multi-process trap=abort harness on the critical path of every lesson; if the content-addressed-caching and wall-clock prototypes miss thresholds, the allocation inverts toward the spec regardless of pedagogy results.
evidenceGaps: Zero AI-codegen evidence cards exist (standing round-2 flag, caveats.md): every claim about how models learn a novel language from in-context spec + examples — the debate's entire subject — is uncarded in all three positions.

The two cards doing the most teaching-argument work are unverified provisional: D009 (silent degradation) and C002 (post-violation observability) are in the pending adversarial sweep (decision-gates.md line 49; round3-synthesis line 78). Only C004's status was correctly carried, by P3.

K001 (Austral, direct_fetch_extracted 2026-07-02) — the corpus's only card touching learn-the-whole-language-from-the-spec philosophy and the adopted minimal-calculus requirement — was cited by no position despite being the nearest actual evidence on kernel sizing and spec-primary feasibility. It is spec-level only; no implementation- or learning-outcome evidence.

D2's binding unit is undefined at the decisive margin: user-directives line 16 binds the language DESCRIPTION (artifact), which caps the rule count regardless of allocation, but whether diagnostic-delivered elaborations, witnesses, and anti-prior notes count against that budget — versus being toolchain output — has no owner ruling. The shared arbitration experiment cannot be scored until 'spec' is defined against 'citation payload'.
Rule-violation frequency distribution (the heavy-tail premise of lazy teaching) is unmeasured — no census exists.
Whether models act on lint-class non-error feedback (round2-synthesis line 104) is untested and gates the only proposed teacher for the checker-invisible quality classes.

Closed-world whole-program check-loop latency at AI-scale program sizes (round2-synthesis line 98) and multi-process trap=abort harness wall-clock (line 72; round2-error-handling line 26) are both unpriced — joint viability gates for any loop-side teaching share.

The restructure-demand lesson class created by the adopted soundness-over-completeness checker lever has no diagnostic design, no spec chapter, and no pack vocabulary in any position; the round-3 battery names the experiment but no teaching-side owner exists.

The Miri-style dynamic-oracle cross-check (decision-gates line 74) is a decided fourth teaching channel — concrete dynamic witnesses for ownership/lifetime errors — placed in no position's allocation.
Diagnostic-content effect (rule text + witness + fix vs rule-ID vs bare message) on repair speed, repeat-violation rate, and generalization is unmeasured.
Concurrent-trap semantics and relaxed-trap-ordering are unspecified (round3 lines 53-54), so runtime lesson attribution — the dynamic half of any loop-teaching story — is currently undefined.

Lesson persistence (whether a cited rule stays learned within and across sessions, including compaction events) and repair-transcript context-cannibalization are both unmeasured, in opposite directions for the two principal positions.
leadingCandidate: Spec-primary-leaning hybrid on P3's delivery mechanism with P1's diagnostic guarantees as law: a D2-capped kernel spec (few uniform rules + canonical worked examples + the diagnostics/report vocabulary, which must be taught eagerly) generated and versioned as a provenance-checked teaching pack; the repair loop carries only prior-correction, mechanical edit-list propagation, and the conceded nonlocal-ownership residue; every diagnostic is deterministic, one-pass-complete, aggregated, and rule-cited pointing back INTO the spec (reinforcement, not substitute curriculum); checker-invisible quality classes route to by-construction design + differential/silent-wrong harness + lint channels, never to either teaching channel; the exact per-rule split is set by the pre-committed ablation experiment, and P3's writability benchmark runs advisory (not shipping-gate) until the transfer-validity study passes.
rationale: The question is genuinely empirical and currently unanswerable to the project's own standard: the corpus has zero AI-codegen cards, the two most-cited teaching anchors (D009, C002) are unverified provisional, and the critic exposed that the debate's core quantity lacks a unit — D2's text (user-directives line 16) binds the language description as an artifact, which already caps the rule count regardless of allocation, but no owner ruling says whether diagnostic-delivered elaborations count against that budget. That definitional gap plus the pending pedagogy experiments force research_needed. Post-critique, however, the positions converge on more than they contest. First, a shared toolchain-guarantee floor survives all attacks and should be adopted now: stable content-addressed rule IDs; deterministic byte-stable diagnostics carrying rule ID, canonical rule text, node-path witness, and edit list where mechanical; complete one-pass error reporting; one-defect-one-repair-site; a rule-to-emitter coverage audit; loop instrumentation; and a single unified telemetry + gated spec-evolution channel (three were proposed; shipped separately they violate the near-duplicate-machinery charter). Second, two structural facts bound the split before any experiment runs: (a) the checker cannot teach what it cannot reject — the D0-critical silent-wrong classes and performance idioms need eager spec/examples plus a differential harness, so the loop can never be primary for what actually matters; (b) the adopted soundness-over-completeness lever creates restructure-demand lessons that are neither spec citations nor mechanical fixes, breaking P1's bijection exactly on the hardest (ownership) errors, while the decided Miri-style dynamic oracle is an unplaced fourth channel. Third, under a D2-compliant few-rules language the eager-vs-lazy token delta shrinks, and the corpus's nearest evidence (K001 Austral spec philosophy, F006 SPARK) favors small-kernel eager feasibility — so the burden of proof sits on moving teaching INTO the loop, and the loop's defensible steady-state role is prior-correction, mechanical propagation, telemetry, and a bounded named ownership residue. P2's direction therefore leads, but stripped of its manufactured legs (the floor-vs-ceiling misreading, the zero-marginal-cost inversion, the three-way-confounded irregularity meter) and mounted on P3's generated-pack mechanism, which is the decided architecture's honest extension for code examples (drift-free) though not for prose. P3's CI gate stays advisory until the benchmark-transfer study passes, because gating language evolution on current-model pass rates is exactly the process-relative acceptance round-3 invariant 4 resists. The named experiments, with the D2 unit ruling first, convert the remaining disagreement into a measured per-rule table.
followUps: Obtain the owner ruling defining D2's binding unit before scoring any pedagogy experiment: does the spec budget bind the language description as an artifact only (rule count capped; delivery channel free), or also the per-task in-context payload; and do diagnostic-delivered rule elaborations, witnesses, and anti-prior notes count against it? Bundle with the pending D1-quantifier/D0-boundary ruling channel (decision-gates.md lines 64, 70-74).

Run THE arbitration experiment (spec-size/pedagogy ablation, merging P1 flag 2 and P2 E1): identical kernel task sets under (a) full kernel spec + examples, no loop; (b) kernel-minus-ablated-rules + rule-family index + citation-grade diagnostics; (c) same as (b) with rule-ID-only diagnostics; (d) full spec + loop. Metrics: first-pass SEMANTIC correctness by differential testing (never checker acceptance — Goodhart guard), iterations-to-green, total tokens (spec + generations + diagnostics + re-reads), wall-clock, within-session repeat-violation rate. Pre-commit thresholds before running, e.g. lazy wins a rule only if total-tokens-to-green ≤ 0.8x eager AND silent-wrong rate is not worse than eager by more than a fixed epsilon.

Run the diagnostic-content ablation (P1 flag 1 = P2 E4b): full citation (rule text + minimal witness + mechanical fix) vs rule-ID-only vs bare location+message; measure iterations-to-green, repeat-offense rate per rule class on subsequent tasks, and cross-rule generalization. This decides whether rule-cited diagnostics are reinforcement or curriculum.
Run the rule-violation census over a generated-program corpus (per rule family, per model) to test the heavy-tail premise that underwrites any lazy allocation.

Run the silent-wrong battery (P2 E2): seeded tasks whose natural failure is well-typed-wrong (region pessimization, context-dropping Result chains, operand-order swaps); compare silent-wrong rates of spec-taught vs repair-taught writers, and test whether repair-taught writers' redundancy annotations retain checksum independence or collapse toward checker-satisfaction.

Design the restructure-demand diagnostic class (the soundness-over-completeness lesson class: no violated rule, no mechanical fix) and place the Miri-style dynamic-oracle witnesses in the teaching allocation; add both to the round-3 AI-writer experiment battery's VC-repair-loop item. No position currently owns either.

Adopt the convergent toolchain-guarantee floor now, independent of the split: stable content-addressed rule IDs; deterministic, byte-stable, one-pass-complete, aggregated diagnostics carrying rule ID + canonical rule text + node-path witness + edit list where one exists; rule-to-emitter coverage audit failing the toolchain build; loop instrumentation (iterations-to-green, repeat-violation rate per rule) as first-class output; N006-grade tested-and-versioned discipline for diagnostic text.

Issue a unification ruling merging the three proposed telemetry/spec-evolution channels (P1 distillation gate, P2 fleet ledger + spec-ROI revision, P3 pack regeneration) into ONE privileged spec-edit operation under the round-3 unified gating regime, with rule-ID stability and cached-prefix invalidation across spec versions specified — otherwise the winning position's tooling violates the near-duplicate-machinery charter.

Run the two loop-viability gates with pre-committed reopen thresholds before assigning any teaching share to the loop: the closed-world content-addressed memoized check-loop pricing prototype (round2-synthesis line 98) and the multi-process trap=abort harness wall-clock measurement (line 72); breach forces burden back toward the spec side.

Complete the pending adversarial verification of D009 and C002 (round3-synthesis line 78) before either card anchors further teaching arguments, and cite K001 (Austral) into the compiler-as-teacher record as the nearest precedent on kernel sizing and spec-learnability.
Specify concurrent-trap semantics and relaxed-trap-ordering (round-2/3 debt) — prerequisites for the dynamic half of any teaching story, since runtime lesson attribution is undefined without them.

Run P3's benchmark-transfer validity study (pack score vs held-out fresh-task success, pre-committed correlation threshold) before its writability CI gate can graduate from advisory to shipping-blocker; pair with a cross-model portability study to size the process-relativity concession.
